title: MedievalJMC
description: Fabric 1.20.1 | Medieval RPG modpack with new weapons, skills, quests, mechanics and other.
body:
Join my [Discord](https://discord.gg/eMHPhhuhjV) for info and other modpacks.
![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a118168990f351a47943d6e96ad4252b0d18ebb.png)
**This is a hardcore medieval modpack with new:**
- Weapons and armor
- Structures and dungeons
- Game mechanics
- Food and drinks
- Mechanisms and structures
- World generation
- Decoration and other mods
- skill tree and quests

**This modpack adds new game classes:**
- Knight
- Archer
- Wizard
- Brute
- spearman

For every class is created a quest line for facilitating the gameplay.

  
  **Battle mechanics**

  With mods [Paladins & Priests (RPG Series)](https://modrinth.com/mod/paladins-and-priests/version/1.2.0+1.20.1-fabric), [Wizards (RPG Series)](https://modrinth.com/mod/wizards/version/1.2.0+1.20.1), [Archers (RPG Series)](https://modrinth.com/mod/archers/version/1.2.1+1.20.1), [Immersive Armors](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-armors/version/1.6.1+1.20.1) [Simply Swords](https://modrinth.com/mod/simply-swords) you can choose the right weapon for you.

  **Character upgrade mechanics**

  With mods [Simply Skills](https://modrinth.com/mod/simply-skills/version/1.3.2+1.20.1), [Jewelry (RPG Series)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jewelry/version/1.3.0+1.20.1), [RPG Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/rpg-origins/version/1.4.1) you can decide how to improve the character and adjust to.

  **Game mechanics**

  Mods [Spelunkery](https://modrinth.com/mod/spelunkery/version/1.20.1-0.3.5), [Dehydration](https://modrinth.com/mod/dehydration/version/1.3.6+1.20.1), [Combat Roll](https://modrinth.com/mod/combat-roll/version/1.3.2+1.20.1-fabric) will add new mechanics for you to be hardcore and interesting.

  **Structures and dungeons**

  Mods [Dungeons and Taverns](https://modrinth.com/mod/dungeons-and-taverns/version/3.0.3.f+mod), [Camps. Castles. Carriages.](https://modrinth.com/mod/camps_castles_carriages/version/2.3.1+mod), [Additional Structures](https://modrinth.com/mod/additional-structures/version/v.4.2.1-fabric), [Mine Cells](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecells/version/1.7.4) will add new structures, dungeons, dimensions and adventures to your world.

  **Food and beverages**

  With mods [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-fabric/version/1.4.3), [[Let's Do] Vinery](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-vinery/version/1.4.19), [[Let's Do] HerbalBrews](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-herbalbrews/version/1.0.7), [[Let's Do] Bakery](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-bakery/version/1.1.9), [[Let's Do] Brewery](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-brewery/version/1.1.8), [[Let's Do] Candlelight](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-candlelight/version/1.2.12),[[Let's Do] Meadow](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-meadow/version/1.3.12) you will always have new and varied food.

  **World generation**

  Mod [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith/version/2.5.0) will change the generation of the world and make it more beautiful.

  **Engineering**

  Mod [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric/version/0.5.1-f-build.1417+mc1.20.1) and its addons will help with the manifestation of imagination and the creation of mechanisms.
